procedures.description: Established Patient Office or Other Outpatient Visit With High Level of Medical Decision Making, if Using Time, 40 Minutes or More

summary: This document is an itemization of professional services provided to Jane Doe at Mayo Clinic on July 3, 2024. It details charges for an established patient office visit and an intravenous Ciprofloxacin administration. After accounting for self-pay discounts, a visit balance of $538.56 remains.

medical_terms.meaning: Ciprofloxacin is an antibiotic medication used to treat a variety of bacterial infections. Administering it 'IV' means it is given intravenously, directly into a vein.
CPT code 99215 describes an established patient office or outpatient visit involving a high level of medical decision-making, or lasting 40 minutes or more of total time on the date of the encounter.
HCPCS code J0744 specifies an injection of ciprofloxacin, 200 mg.

patient_advice: Review the itemized services and charges carefully to ensure accuracy and understand all services rendered.
Contact Mayo Clinic's billing department directly at 1-844-217-9591 for any questions regarding this statement or your balance.
recommended_questions: What specific bacterial infection was the Ciprofloxacin IV administered to treat?
Are there any payment plans or financial assistance programs available to help manage the remaining balance?
